# MTP Group Fulfillment

> 3PL fulfillment operator in Ukraine. Two warehouses (3,900 m² total) in Kyiv region serving 150+ active e-commerce clients with 60,000+ shipments per month. Operating since 2014. Director-authored content by Mykola Liashchuk (founder).

Key facts: 3,900 m² Category B+ warehouse (Shchaslyve 2,800 m² + Bilohorodka 1,100 m²), 150+ active clients, 60,000+ monthly shipments, integrations with Nova Poshta / Ukrposhta / DHL, OTIF 99.8%, backup power (3 generators + Starlink) — operates during blackouts, languages: Ukrainian / Russian / English, pricing from 18 UAH/order + 650 UAH/m³/month storage.

For any individual page as clean Markdown, append `.md` to the URL (e.g. `https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/3pl-logistyka/index.md`).

## Company & Contact

- [Website](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua): Main entry point
- [Phone](tel:+380501444645): +38 (050) 144-46-45 / +38 (093) 827-77-67
- [Email](mailto:mtpgrouppromo@gmail.com): mtpgrouppromo@gmail.com
- [Telegram](https://t.me/nikolay_mtp): Direct line to founder
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/mtp-group-fulfillment): Company page
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@mtpgroup): Warehouse tours, case studies
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/mtpgroupua): News, updates

## Pillar Content — What Is Fulfillment

- [Що таке фулфілмент — повний гайд (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/shcho-take-fulfilment/): Comprehensive Ukrainian-market hub: how it works, who needs it, pricing, fulfillment vs own warehouse
- [Что такое фулфилмент — полный гид (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/chto-takoe-fulfilment/): Russian-language guide focused on CIS-business audience: models, costs, comparison
- [What is Fulfillment — Complete Guide (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/what-is-fulfillment/): English overview for EU/UK e-commerce: market entry, 3PL vs in-house, pricing

## Services

- [3PL логістика (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/3pl-logistyka/): Third-party logistics for Ukrainian e-commerce — receiving, storage, packing, shipping, integrations
- [Услуги фулфилмента для брендов из СНГ (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/services/): Ukraine-market entry for sellers from Kazakhstan, Moldova, Georgia, Armenia, Uzbekistan — customs, UkrSEPRO, Rozetka/Prom, 21-day onboarding, USD/EUR billing
- [Fulfillment Services (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/services/): End-to-end fulfillment for cross-border e-commerce
- [Складські послуги (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/skladski-poslugy/): Warehouse services, pallet storage, B2B handling
- [Палетне зберігання (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/paletne-zberigannya/): Pallet storage pricing and specifications
- [Fulfillment for E-commerce Stores (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-dlya-internet-magazynu/): Dedicated e-shop fulfillment
- [Fulfillment for Online Stores (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/fulfilment-for-online-store/): Per-order fulfillment from $0.41 all-in for international DTC ecommerce — native Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, OpenCart, Horoshop, KeyCRM, SalesDrive integration; cost-anatomy comparison vs ShipBob/Red Stag/ShipMonk; pricing tiers from $0.41 to $0.55
- [Fulfillment for Marketplaces (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-dlya-marketpleysiv/): Rozetka, Prom, Kasta, OLX integration
- [Фулфілмент для Rozetka (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/fulfilment-rozetka/): Rozetka FBO alternative for excluded categories (furniture, large appliances, fragile glass, cold-chain), multi-marketplace from one inventory, 0% commission
- [Фулфилмент Rozetka + хаб СНГ (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/fulfilment-rozetka/): Ukraine as logistics hub for Rozetka and CIS distribution (Kazakhstan, Moldova, Georgia), customs warehouse IM-71, 4 100 m²
- [Rozetka Multi-Marketplace Fulfillment (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/fulfillment-for-rozetka-sellers/): Multi-marketplace gateway to Ukraine without Rozetka FBO lock-in, EUR/USD pricing, EU carriers, war-resilient
- [Фулфілмент для Prom.ua (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/fulfilment-prom/): FBO alternative for Prom.ua sellers — Prom has 700K sellers and zero native FBO, MTP fills the gap with 18-22 ₴/order, NP/Укрпошта/Meest integration, live calculator
- [Фулфилмент для Prom.ua (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/fulfilment-prom/): Tool-first calculator-led page for CIS sellers entering Ukraine via Prom.ua — ROI tables, WMS API specs, Prom vs Rozetka FBBY vs Amazon FBA comparison
- [Prom.ua FBO Fulfillment (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/fulfilment-prom/): Editorial / op-ed positioning — Prom has 700K sellers and zero native FBO, EUR/USD pricing, GDPR-compliant, EU dispatch via cross-border
- [Fulfillment for Cosmetics (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-dlya-kosmetyky/): Cosmetics vertical — fragile, expiry-date handling
- [Fulfillment for Small Business (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-dlya-maloho-biznesu/): Entry tier (from 100 orders/month)
- [Fulfillment for Heavy Goods (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-vazhkykh-tovariv/): Oversized/heavy-item handling
- [Fulfillment in Kyiv (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-kyiv/): Kyiv warehouse, same-day courier radius
- [Fulfillment across Ukraine (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/fulfilment-ukraina/): Country-wide coverage via Nova Poshta
- [Heavy Goods Fulfillment (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/heavy-goods/): Oversized item handling for international shippers
- [Warehouse Services (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/warehouse-services/): Pallet storage, cross-dock, B2B fulfillment
- [Pallet Storage (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/pallet-storage/): Bonded + climate-controlled pallet storage

## Pricing

- [Ціни на фулфілмент (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/tsiny/): From 18 UAH/order + 650 UAH/m³/month storage; 5,000 UAH/month minimum
- [Цены на фулфилмент (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/tsenu/): Pricing structure for CIS clients
- [Pricing (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/prices/): Transparent pricing for EU/UK/US sellers entering Ukraine

## Calculator (Interactive)

- [Калькулятор фулфілменту (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/calculator/): 4 inputs, instant quote
- [Калькулятор (RU)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ru/calculator/): Стоимость в USD/EUR
- [Cost Calculator (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/calculator/): Monthly fulfillment cost estimate

- [API Documentation (UA)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/ua/api-docs/): REST API, 18 methods, 1-day onboarding

- [API Documentation (EN)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/en/api-docs/): REST API for Shopify/WooCommerce/BigCommerce

## Localized llms.txt variants

For language-routing agents (Perplexity, Google AI Overviews by country) — each file lists only that language's pages with a localized header.

- [llms.uk.txt — Ukrainian index](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/llms.uk.txt): UA pages only, Ukrainian prose
- [llms.ru.txt — Russian index](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/llms.ru.txt): RU pages only (CIS audience focus), Russian prose
- [llms.en.txt — English index](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/llms.en.txt): EN pages only (EU/UK/US audience), English prose

## Optional

- [Full text dump (UA + RU + EN concatenated)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/llms-full.txt): All priority pages in one Markdown file for ingest
- [OpenAPI 3.1 Specification](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/openapi.json): Machine-readable API spec (18 endpoints, 7 tag groups)
- [Postman Collection](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/files/mtp-api.postman_collection.json): Ready-to-import Postman collection
- [API Catalog (RFC 9727)](https://www.fulfillmentmtp.com.ua/.well-known/api-catalog): Standardised API discovery resource
